full_text:
Gao Wang 高望
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Wang (高望)was born in Jingzhao. An officer of medicines, he was close to Prince Liu Bian. Killed in the massacre. Gao Wang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Gao Wang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
